Patch Set 1:

This seems to have fixed conf-sanity/41c.

Patch Set 1:

Failed enforced test review-dne-part-4 on RHEL 9.3/x86_64 uploaded by Trevis Autotest from trevis-98vm1: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/b843f3d6-4360-4575-b721-5f3a38998594 ran 9 tests.  1 tests failed: sanity-flr.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

It looks reasonable.

Unfortunately I didn't notice that this was (mostly) ready before the conf-sanity/41c disabling patch was landed, since several subtests started failing consistently due to changing over to default test sessions to MDSCOUNT=4 and use el9.3 servers.

I will rebase this onto master so that it can remove the always_except line before landing, and add "trivial" so the testing can complete in a more timely manner (though this is less urgent now that the test is skipped).  That also gives more time to review the patch.

parents.subject: LU-13374 mdd: fix close time update race with set-in-past

commit.subject: LU-17269 obdclass: fix locking for class_register/deregister
commit.message:
LU-17269 obdclass: fix locking for class_register/deregister

Prevent registration and deregistration from racing with
each other. Otherwise, we could see a crash.
